roleSelection.title: Choose your role
roleSelection.subtitle: How do you want to use inturn?
roleSelection.internDescription: I'm looking for internships and want to build my professional track record
roleSelection.companyDescription: I want to post internships and recruit talent

basics.title: Tell us about you
basics.subtitle: 30 seconds. We use this to match you to the right internships.
basics.universityHelper: Searchable list of 300+ Tunisian universities + grandes écoles.
basics.cityHelper: Sets default on-site filter. Doesn't block remote applications.
basics.preferredLanguageHelper: This sets the app's language and the default for your applications.

skills.title: Your skills
skills.subtitle: 3 to 8 skills. Specific beats generic — "React" wins over "frontend".
skills.rolesLabel: What kind of role do you want?
skills.rolesHelper: Pick up to 3. We use these as the primary match.
skills.cvHelper: PDF, max 5 MB · We'll read it and suggest more skills

done.title: Profile complete
done.subtitle: You're ready to apply. Browse internships and start building your record.

company.title: About your company
company.subtitle: What design partners and interns see. You can edit anything later.
company.name: Company name
company.verificationTitle: Verification is required before your first acceptance — not now.
company.verificationBody: You can draft listings, browse profiles, and prepare your workspace. Posting publicly and accepting interns needs business registry docs.
company.rneHelper: PDF or image · Reviewed by our team in <24h

landing.title: The internship platform for Tunisia
landing.subtitle: Discover internships, build your track record, connect with companies

interns.title: For students
interns.subtitle: Real internships, real work, real proof.

points.heading: One profile, every application
points.body: Your CV, skills, and preferences live in one place. Apply in one tap.

points.heading: Work that counts
points.body: Each internship runs inside a workspace with clear scope and deliverables. Your record is verifiable, not a promise.

points.heading: Async-friendly
points.body: Remote-first internships are first-class. Hours that fit your schedule.

companies.title: For companies
companies.subtitle: Post once. Run the program inside inturn. No more WhatsApp threads.

points.heading: Set up in 15 minutes
points.body: Post a structured internship in minutes. Get pre-screened applications back inside the platform.

points.heading: Run the work inside the workspace
points.body: Tasks, deliverables, comments, check-ins. The whole program in one place.

steps.heading: Post
steps.body: Companies define scope, deliverables, and deadlines.

steps.heading: Match
steps.body: Students apply through their inturn profile. Companies shortlist and accept.

steps.heading: Run
steps.body: A workspace opens automatically. Real work happens. Performance is recorded.

stuck.label: Stuck?
stuck.title: Tell us what's blocking you
stuck.placeholder: Describe what you tried and what's not working

checkIn.title: Weekly check-in
checkIn.shipped: What did you ship this week?
checkIn.shippedPlaceholder: What did you close, deliver, decide?
checkIn.nextPlaceholder: What will you tackle this coming week?
checkIn.draftedByAi: Drafted by AI — edit before submitting

schedule.title: Schedule a check-in
schedule.description: Pick a slot; we'll create a Jitsi link and put it on the timeline.

comments.empty: No comments yet. Be the first.

timeline.emptySub: Tasks, deliverables, and check-ins will appear here as they happen.

marketplace.title: Browse internships
marketplace.subtitle: Real internships from Tunisian companies. Apply once with your inturn profile.
marketplace.noResultsHelp: Try removing filters or broadening your search.

bookmarks.savedDescription: Your wishlist. Heart any internship from the marketplace to keep it here.
bookmarks.emptySub: Browse the marketplace and tap the heart on anything you want to come back to.

root.title: Something went wrong.
root.body: We've been notified. Try again, or head back to the home page.

platform.title: This page hit an error.
platform.body: Try again or open another tab from the sidebar. If it keeps happening, ping support.

marketplace.title: Couldn't load the marketplace.
marketplace.body: We'll get it back in a moment. Try again or visit later.
